info.title: Microsoft Power Platform REST API - workflowsagent
info.description: Unified API for all administrative capabilities in Microsoft Power Platform.

get.summary: Get flow run actions for DSR export.
get.description: Returns the action history for a specific flow run.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Byte offset continuation token for paging.

200.description: Successful request. Flow run action history returned.

Retry-After.description: Present when additional pages are available. Indicates the recommended delay in seconds before fetching the next page.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved or feature is not enabled.

get.description: Returns approval records for DSR compliance export.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

delete.summary: Delete an approval for DSR compliance.
delete.description: Deletes an approval and associated records for DSR compliance.

400.description: Bad request. Approval ID is not a valid GUID.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

get.description: Returns user connections for DSR compliance export.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

delete.summary: Delete a connection for DSR compliance.
delete.description: Deletes a connection for DSR compliance.

parameters.name: connectionIdentifier
parameters.description: The connection ID in apiName/connectionName format.

400.description: Bad request. Connection ID is not in expected format.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

get.summary: Get conversation transcripts for DSR export.
get.description: Returns conversation transcripts for DSR compliance export.

Retry-After.description: Present when additional pages are available. Indicates the recommended delay in seconds before fetching the next page.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved or feature is not enabled.

get.summary: Get flow run actions for DSR export (environment-scoped).
get.description: Returns action history for a flow run in an environment.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Byte offset continuation token for paging.

200.description: Successful request. Flow run action history returned.

Retry-After.description: Present when additional pages are available. Indicates the recommended delay in seconds before fetching the next page.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have read access to the flow run.

404.description: Not found. Feature is not enabled for this environment.

get.summary: Get conversation transcripts for DSR export (environment-scoped).
get.description: Returns conversation transcripts for a given environment.

Retry-After.description: Present when additional pages are available. Indicates the recommended delay in seconds before fetching the next page.

404.description: Not found. Feature is not enabled for this environment.

get.summary: Get flow runs for DSR export (environment-scoped).
get.description: Returns flow run records for a flow in an environment.

404.description: Not found. Specified environment could not be found.

get.summary: Get run history customer data for DSR export (environment-scoped).
get.description: Returns run history data for a flow run in an environment.

200.description: Successful request. Run history data returned.

404.description: Not found. Specified environment could not be found.

get.description: Returns flows owned by the calling user for DSR export.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

delete.summary: Delete a flow for DSR compliance.
delete.description: Deletes a flow in the M365 Copilot workflows environment for DSR compliance.

400.description: Bad request. Flow ID is not a valid GUID.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

get.summary: Get flow runs for DSR export.
get.description: Returns flow run records for a flow for DSR export.

400.description: Bad request. Flow ID is not a valid GUID.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

get.summary: Get run history customer data for DSR export.
get.description: Returns run history customer data for a flow run.

200.description: Successful request. Run history data returned.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

get.summary: Get AI model prompts for DSR export.
get.description: Returns AI prompt records for DSR compliance export.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

delete.summary: Delete an AI model prompt for DSR compliance.
delete.description: Deletes an AI model prompt for DSR compliance.

400.description: Bad request. Prompt ID is not a valid GUID.

404.description: Not found. M365 Copilot workflows environment could not be resolved.

DsrFlowRunsResponse.description: Response containing flow run action history for DSR export.

value.description: List of flow run data entries.

nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results, if available.

DsrFlowRunData.description: Action event data for a single flow run.

actionEvents.description: List of action events in the run.

ActionEvent.description: An action event in a flow run. Type determines properties.

ActionEventBase.description: Common properties shared by all action event types.

previousActionIds.description: IDs of actions that preceded this one.

TriggerEvent.description: A trigger event that initiated the flow run.

ThoughtEvent.description: A thought event representing agent reasoning.

text.description: The text content of the thought.

images.description: Base64-encoded images associated with the thought.

Base64ThoughtImage.description: A base64-encoded image associated with a thought.

ConnectorActionStartEvent.description: Event marking the start of a connector action execution.

ConnectorActionStartProperties.description: Properties of a connector action start event.

inputs.description: Input data for the connector action.

ValidationProperties.description: Validation requirements for a connector action.

requiresInlineApproval.description: Whether the action requires inline user approval before execution.

ConnectorActionEndEvent.description: Event marking the completion of a connector action execution.

synchronousOperationName.description: Name of the synchronous operation, if applicable.

ConnectorActionEndProperties.description: Properties of a connector action end event.

isRetryable.description: Whether the runtime can retry a failed action.

errorCode.description: Error code from the failed operation, if available.

ActionValidationResponseEvent.description: Event representing a user validation response to an action requiring approval.

ActionValidationResponseProperties.description: Properties of an action validation response event.

ActionSuggestionRequestEvent.description: Event representing an action suggestion from the agent.

ActionSuggestionRequestProperties.description: Properties of an action suggestion request event.

FlowOutputEvent.description: Event representing the final output of the flow run.

FlowOutputProperties.description: Properties of a flow output event.

ActionProperties.description: Identifies the connector action being invoked.

serverName.description: Name of the server handling the action.

isA2aServerCall.description: Whether this is an agent-to-agent server call.

ApiProperties.description: Identifies the API for a connector action.

name.description: APIM API name in the environment.

logicalName.description: Name of the managed connector in Dataverse, if applicable.

ConnectionProperties.description: Connection details for a connector action.

connectionReferenceLogicalName.description: The corresponding connection reference in Dataverse.

OperationProperties.description: Identifies the specific operation within a connector.

contentSize.description: Size of the linked content in bytes.

ActionOutputProperties.description: Output data from a connector action.

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the connector response.

BodyProperties.description: Body content of an action output.

contentLength.description: Length of the body content in bytes.

contentType.description: MIME type of the body content.

value.description: The body content. Structure varies by content type.

valueLink.description: URL to retrieve the body content if not inlined.

fileName.description: File name, if the body represents a file.

ResponseMetadataProperties.description: Metadata extracted from a connector action response.

SensitivityLabelProperties.description: Sensitivity label information from a connector response.

sensitivityLabelId.description: Unique identifier of the sensitivity label.

displayName.description: Display name of the sensitivity label.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text for the sensitivity label.

color.description: Color associated with the sensitivity label.

isEncrypted.description: Whether the labeled content is encrypted.

ActionStatus.description: Status of a connector action execution.

ActionResponse.description: User response to an action validation request.

RunningActionType.description: Execution model of the connector action.

ContentTypeCategory.description: Category of the body content type.

DsrConversationTranscriptsResponse.description: Response containing conversation transcripts for DSR export.

nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results, if available.

serviceRequestCorrelationId.description: Service request correlation ID for tracing.

ConversationTranscriptSystemMetadata.description: System metadata for a conversation transcript.

ConversationTranscriptScenario.description: The scenario under which the conversation occurred.

ConversationTranscriptRequest.description: The request portion of a conversation transcript.

ConversationTranscriptResponse.description: The response portion of a conversation transcript.

role.description: Role of the message sender (e.g. user, assistant, system, tool).

name.description: Name of the message sender, if applicable.

isCustomerContent.description: Whether this message contains customer content.

toolCalls.description: Tool calls made in this message.

toolCallId.description: ID of the tool call this message is responding to.

ConversationTranscriptCompletion.description: A completion generated in the conversation response.

finishReason.description: Reason the completion finished (e.g. stop, tool_calls).

toolCalls.description: Tool calls requested by the completion.

ConversationTranscriptToolCall.description: A tool call within a conversation.

id.description: Unique identifier of the tool call.

ConversationTranscriptFunction.description: Function details of a tool call.

arguments.description: JSON-encoded arguments passed to the function.

ConversationTranscriptTool.description: A tool available during the conversation.

description.description: Description of what the function does.

parameters.description: JSON Schema defining the function parameters.

DsrPagedResponse.description: Generic paged response for DSR compliance APIs.

value.description: Collection of records. Structure varies by resource type.

nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results, if available.
